name: No Fillers
description: Do not use any filler words (um, uh, like, you know, actually).

name: No Long Pauses
description: Do not pause for more than 2 seconds at any point.

name: Word Master (3)
description: Use at least 3 advanced vocabulary words.

name: Word Master (5)
description: Use at least 5 advanced vocabulary words.

name: Start with Question
description: Begin your speech with a rhetorical question.

name: Story Mode
description: Frame your response as a narrative with a beginning, middle, and end.

name: No Repetition
description: Do not repeat any word more than 3 times.

name: Metaphor Master
description: Include at least one metaphor in your speech.

name: Pace Control
description: Keep your WPM between 120-140 for the entire session.
